title: Zig Reduction + Softmax + BatchNorm Ops
description:
Implement zig/src/ops/reduce.zig: Sum, mean, max, min, argmax along arbitrary axes. Keepdim support. SIMD-accelerated inner loops. Implement zig/src/ops/softmax.zig: Online numerically-stable softmax (single-pass max+sum via online trick). LogSoftmax variant. Implement zig/src/ops/batchnorm.zig: Welford single-pass mean+variance. Forward with running stats update. Training vs inference mode.

Tests: test_reduce.zig (reduce correctness along each axis of 3D tensor), test_softmax.zig (sums to 1.0, handles [-1000,1000] without overflow, LogSoftmax), test_batchnorm.zig (output mean~0/var~1, running stats updated). bench_reduce.zig: SIMD reduce_sum vs scalar on 1M elements.

Pass/fail: Reduce >=3x vs scalar. Softmax: no inf/nan on inputs in [-1000,1000]. BatchNorm single-pass >=1.5x vs two-pass.
